title: please draft employee declaration regarding his requirement to report to the Company’s Compliance Officer all suspicious…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: please draft employee declaration regarding his requirement to report to the Company’s Compliance Officer all suspicious or irregular information regarding a client and/or potential customer (lead) that may come to my attention as soon as possible

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
I, [Employee Name], pledge to uphold the highest standards of integrity and professionalism in my role at [Company Name]. I understand the importance of maintaining a culture of compliance and adherence to regulations that govern our industry.

As such, I declare that I am committed to reporting all suspicious or irregular information regarding a client and/or potential customer (lead) that may come to my attention as soon as possible to the Company's Compliance Officer.

I recognize that failure to report such information could result in significant legal, financial, and reputational consequences for the Company and its stakeholders. Therefore, I agree to prioritize the timely reporting of any concerns that may arise in the course of my duties, in accordance with the Company's policies and procedures.

I further attest that I have read and understand the Company's Code of Conduct and Compliance policies, and agree to abide by all relevant regulations, guidelines, and ethical principles in the discharge of my duties.

Signed,

[Employee Name]

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
please draft it legally better 
full compliance with any applicable work space safety regulations as well as being responsible for the wellbeing and safety of the Service Providers work space in the Customer’s premises.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
I, [Employee Name], hereby declare that I will comply fully with all applicable work space safety regulations and standards in the performance of my duties, in adherence to the Company's Workplace Safety policies.

I recognize that ensuring a safe and healthy work environment is not just a legal requirement, but also a moral obligation towards the Service Providers. As such, I pledge to take all necessary precautions to minimize any potential hazards and promote safety in the Service Provider's work space, while on the Customer's premises.

I understand that failure to comply with these policies and regulations could result in significant legal and financial consequences for the Company, as well as potential harm to the Service Providers, the Customer, and their respective employees. Therefore, I agree to uphold these obligations with the utmost respect and diligence.

I hereby acknowledge that I have received, read, and understand the Company's policies on Workplace Safety, and pledge to uphold them in the discharge of my duties.

Signed,

[Employee Name]

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
please draft more soft clause

In is hereby clarified that to the extent that third party products shall be incorporated in the Work Product or otherwise supplied under a Work Order, then such third party products’ shall at all times be subject to the standard license and maintenance terms and/or agreements of their suppliers.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
It is hereby clarified that in the event that third-party products are incorporated into the Work Product or supplied through a Work Order, such products shall at all times be subject to the standard license and maintenance terms and/or agreements of their respective suppliers.

The Company shall make reasonable efforts to ensure that such third-party products are compatible with the Work Product and fulfill the Customer's requirements as set forth in the Work Order. However, the Company does not warrant or guarantee the performance, reliability, or fitness for any particular purpose of any third-party products, including any associated warranties or support obligations.

In the event that such third-party products fail to meet the Customer's requirements or cause any issues or damages to the Work Product or other systems, the Company shall endeavor to work with the relevant third-party supplier to rectify the issue. However, the customer understands and agrees that the Company shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect losses, damages, or expenses related to the use or performance of such third-party products.

The Customer hereby acknowledges and accepts the standard licensing and maintenance terms and/or agreements of the relevant third-party suppliers, and agrees to comply with all relevant terms and conditions in relation to such products.

Signed,

[Company Representative]

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: A placement fee is a type of fee paid to a person or company for their assistance with placing an individual in a job position. It is often paid by an employer to a recruitment agency or headhunter to cover the costs associated with identifying, screening, and recommending qualified candidates for a position. Placement fees can also refer to fees paid by job seekers to recruitment agencies or other intermediaries for assistance with finding a job. These fees may be a flat rate or a percentage of the new employee's starting salary. Placement fees can vary widely depending on the level of the job, the industry, and the specific services provided.
